title: Support unpacked structs in DPI-C calls

features.name: unpacked struct definition with int members
features.description: Code should include an unpacked struct definition with two int members, identical to a C struct layout

features.name: DPI-C import function with struct parameter
features.description: Code should include a DPI-C import function declaration that takes an unpacked struct as its argument

features.name: packed struct workaround with reversed field order
features.description: Code should include a packed struct definition where fields are declared in reverse order as a workaround for DPI-C struct passing issues
